name: Muffelatta Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green olives with pimientos, coarsely chopped
1 cup Kalamata olives, pitted and coarsely chopped
2 tbsp white wine vinegar (use balsamic vinegar if available)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix olives, onions, anchovies, pimientos, parsley, oregano, basil, olive oil, garlic, and vinegar in a small non-corrosive bowl.
2. Slice the bread horizontally, removing crumbs from each half, leaving a one-half inch shell.
3. On the bottom half of the bread shell, spread half of the olive mixture.
4. Arrange tomatoes, lettuce, and onions on top.
5. Arrange meats and cheeses on top of this layer.
6. Add remaining tomatoes, lettuce, and onions.
7. Spoon remaining olive mixture over the sandwich.
8. Place the top bread shell on the sandwich.
9. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C) and bake the sandwich on a baking sheet until cheese melts, about 15 minutes.
10. Slice into wedges and serve.
